items.name: Aqua (Danone)
items.notes: Balanced bottled-water baseline for sweet, clean brews.

items.name: Le Minerale
items.notes: Slightly broader mineral profile that can read fuller and softer.

items.name: Nestle Pure Life
items.notes: A cleaner, lighter profile that keeps clarity and florals open.

items.name: Cleo (Distilled/RO)
items.notes: Very low mineral water. Best when blended or remineralized for filter coffee.

items.name: Amidis (Distilled)
items.notes: Ultra-low mineral baseline that needs careful recipe energy.

items.name: Balanced Filter Water
items.notes: Generic SCA-friendly profile for international cafes and home brewers.

items.name: Soft Spring Water
items.notes: Soft water profile that rewards slightly higher temperature and a touch more extraction.

items.name: Custom ppm input
items.notes: Use when you know your own water or mineral recipe.
